g.title: PICO_AUDIO_I2S
g.text: Only these signals plus power and ground are needed when the Audio Pack is not stacked directly on the Pico.

g.title: AUDIO_PACK1
g.text: If the pack is stacked directly on the Pico, this fly-lead harness collapses into the board-to-board header.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_LCD
g.text: These are the six remaining free GPIO once motors, the HC-SR04 pair, and the planned GP18 and GP19 servo outputs are reserved.

g.title: LCD_BACKLIGHT
g.text: LEDA should include an inline ~220 Ohm series resistor if the module does not already provide one.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_SENSOR
g.text: Two HC-SR04 modules share one 4-channel BSS138 level shifter.

g.title: LEVEL_SHIFT1
g.text: Four independent BSS138 channels with 10 kOhm pullups. All four channels are used by the left and right HC-SR04 TRIG/ECHO pairs.

g.title: US1
g.text: 2 cm to 4 m, about 15 mA, 10 us trigger pulse. Forward-left obstacle sensor.

g.title: US2
g.text: 2 cm to 4 m, about 15 mA, 10 us trigger pulse. Forward-right obstacle sensor.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_SERVO
g.text: Reserved end-state servo PWM outputs. Not yet bound in motion-controller firmware.

g.title: SERVO_BUS_PAN
g.text: Combines Pico PWM with the dedicated 6 V servo rail.

g.title: SERVO_BUS_TILT
g.text: Combines Pico PWM with the dedicated 6 V servo rail.
